title: SV: wait on boolean leads to Empty NexusSet from wait expression.

features.name: wait on boolean equality in class virtual task
features.description: Code should include a wait statement with a boolean equality expression that compares a class member variable to a constant value, inside a virtual task
features.snippet: virtual task get(output int out_xn); wait (is_empty == 0); endtask

features.name: class with bit member used in wait condition
features.description: Code should include a class with a bit-typed member variable that is directly referenced in a wait condition expression
